label: PASS
rationale: RangeNNNN rows beyond the minimum depend on supported ranges; before MaxRanges is observed, Range9 may exist, and SUCCESS is compliant when the returned ACL matches the RangeNNNN Get ACL pattern.

label: PASS
rationale: Range9 is optional before MaxRanges is observed; if the AccessControl association is absent, GetACL shall return NOT_AUTHORIZED.

label: FAIL
rationale: A successful GetACL for Locking_Range9/Get must return the RangeNNNN/Range9 ACL pattern, not the Range1 ACL.

label: PASS
rationale: K_AES RangeNNNN rows are optional; before MaxRanges is observed, Range9 may exist, and SUCCESS is compliant when the returned ACL matches the RangeNNNN GenKey ACL pattern.

label: PASS
rationale: K_AES Range9 is optional before MaxRanges is observed; if the AccessControl association is absent, GetACL shall return NOT_AUTHORIZED.

label: FAIL
rationale: A prior successful Range9 GetACL observes a Range9 association; a later LockingInfo.MaxRanges value of 8 is inconsistent because MaxRanges is the maximum number of non-global ranges.
